title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PAMPANGA SCHOOL OF ARTS- AND TRADES IN THE MUÂ­NICIPALITY OF BACOLOR, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO DON HONORIO VENTURA MEMORIAL SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2414 / 60 OG No. 38, 5978 (September 21, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3861, June 12, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PAMPANGA SCHOOL OF ARTS- AND TRADES IN THE MUÂNICIPALITY OF BACOLOR, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO DON HONORIO VENTURA MEMORIAL SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Section 1. The name of the Pampanga School of Arts and Trades in the Municipality of Bacolor, Province of Pampanga, is changed to Don Honorio Ventura Memorial School of Arts and Trades.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1964.
